Description: Your only limit is your imagination... and resources
Craft a door to stop monsters from entering your house
Actual Requirements: Obtain any type of door (can be an iron door)

Description: Craft some slabs
Craft some stairs
Craft every type of slab
Craft every type of stairs
Sleep in a bed to change your respawn point
Actual Requirements: Sleep in a bed. You do not have to pass the night

Description: Dye your bed a different color than white
Actual Requirements: Obtain a bed of any color other than white

Description: Craft every color of bed
Go 30 days without sleep
Climb the ladder!
Craft and place down a trapdoor
Actual Requirements: Place any type of trapdoor (can be an iron trapdoor)

Description: Craft and place an iron door
Erect some fencing
Actual Requirements: Place any type of fence (can be nether brick fence)

Description: Build some cobblestone walls
Craft every type of wall
Actual Requirements:
Obtain the following walls: Cobblestone, Mossy Cobblestone, Brick, Prismarine, Red Sandstone, Mossy Stone Brick, Granite, Stone Brick, Nether Brick, 
Andesite, Red Nether Brick, Sandstone, End Stone Brick, Diorite, Blackstone, Polished Blackstone, Polished Blackstone Brick, Cobbled Deepslate, 
Polished Deepslate, Deepslate Brick, Deepslate Tile, Mud Brick, Tuff, Polished Tuff, Tuff Brick, Resin Brick

Description: Craft and place down a chest for storing your items
Actual Requirements: Place a Chest or Copper Chest

Description: Craft and place a barrel. Totally not for riding in
Craft a lectern using wooden slabs and a bookshelf then place it
Notes: Known as "Speech! Speech! Speech!" until 1.7. Still referred to as such internally

Description: Fill a Chiseled Bookshelf with books
Actual Requirements: Place a book inside a Chiseled Bookshelf such that all slots become occupied

Description: Put a Shelf on a Shelf
Actual Requirements: Put any kind of shelf in one of the slots of any kind of shelf

Description: Swap your entire hotbar of items with a trio of powered Shelves
Craft and place a sign
Put up a Hanging Sign
Actual Requirements: Place any type of hanging sign

Description: Use honeycomb to wax a sign, setting its ink for eternity
Dye a sign with each color of dye
Actual Requirements: Use all 16 dyes on any sign

Description: Craft an item frame for displaying your items
Notes: Known as "Display your items for all to see..." until 1.8

Description: Put up a painting
Place every type of painting
Actual Requirements: Every painting is listed on Minecraft wiki at https://minecraft.wiki/w/Painting

Description: Craft and place a banner
Craft a loom with string and planks for creating your own banners
Craft all 16 banner colors
Obtain all the special banner patterns
Light up the area with some torches
Craft and place a campfire using some logs, sticks and coal
Place every type of cookable food on a campfire
Travel close to 0,0 coordinates and place down a campfire
Actual Requirements: Place a campfire or soul campfire with x and z coordinates both being between -10 and 10, in any dimension

Description: Light up the area with jack o'lanterns!

Advancement Name: One Pickle, Two Pickle, Sea Pickle, Four
Description: Place four sea pickles in a group underwater
Actual Requirements: Place a sea pickle on top of three existing sea pickles to create a group of four

Description: Place a candle and light it using Flint and Steel
Parent: One Pickle, Two Pickle, Sea Pickle, Four
Actual Requirements: Light any type of candle or candle cake using either Flint and Steel or a Fire Charge

Description: Get one stack of Black Candles
Place a candle on a cake
Light up the area with glowstone
Light up the area with Shroomlight!
Light up the area with soul fire torches and soul fire lanterns!
Actual Requirements: Place a soul fire torch and a soul fire lantern

Description: Light up the area with all three hues of Froglight
Actual Requirements: Place Ochre, Verdant and Pearlescent Froglights

Description: Light up the area using a lantern
Light up the area with Copper Torches and Copper Lanterns!
Actual Requirements: Place a Copper Torch and any kind of Copper Lantern

Description: Light up the area with some redstone lamps
Light up the area with a Copper Bulb!
Scrape a Copper Bulb with an axe to make it brighter
Actual Requirements: Use an axe on a Copper Bulb that is either waxed or exposed, weathered or oxidized

Description: Light up the area with some sea lanterns
Light up the area with some end rods
Hold a stack of every light-emitting block and item
Actual Requirements:
Obtain a stack of:The following do not need to be obtained even though they emit light: Beacons, Conduits, Furnaces, Blast Furnaces, Smokers, Redstone Ore, Brewing Stands, 
Brown Mushrooms, Dragon Eggs, Sculk Sensors, Sculk Catalysts and any other light-emitting blocks not mentioned

Description: Chop down enough trees to collect a full stack of one log type

Actual Requirements: Obtain a "wood" or "hyphae" block of any kind

Actual Requirements: Strip a wood or hyphae block using an axe

Description: It's coarse, and rough, and irritating, and it gets everywhere

Actual Requirements: Place a grass block at y-level 280 or higher in the Overworld

Actual Requirements: Obtain any color of concrete powder

Engrave sandstone with creeper and wither patterns

Description: Use your furnace to smelt cobblestone back into stone

Actual Requirements: Get killed by thorns damage from an Armor Stand that is equipped with Thorns-enchanted armor
